summary: Bug fix verification for 'overlay rendering on results screen map' completed successfully. Backend returns overlays with x_percent/y_percent coordinates correctly (verified via pytest). Frontend: All 5 overlays render on map using pixel-based positioning (left: 48.44px, top: 194px) instead of percentage strings. Overlay markers visible as colored circles (green=stand, orange=corridor, blue=route, red=avoid). Tapping markers shows detail panel. ALL OVERLAYS section lists all items. MAP/ANALYSIS tab toggle working. Edit mode with ADD/DELETE toolbar working. Bug fix verified: pixel-based positioning (calculated from MAP_WIDTH/MAP_HEIGHT) works correctly in React Native Web.

react_native_issues.issue: Shows 'React Native WebView does not support this platform' on web preview
react_native_issues.note: Expected behavior for MapLibre in web preview. ANALYSIS tab with image overlays is the primary view and works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ BUG FIX VERIFIED: Overlays render on results screen map with pixel-based positioning
✅ DraggableMarker component uses pixel positioning: left=(x_percent/100)*MAP_WIDTH-16, top=(y_percent/100)*MAP_HEIGHT-16 (lines 769-770)
✅ overlayMarker has zIndex: 10 for proper layering (line 893)
✅ overlayZone has zIndex: 5 for proper layering (line 899)
✅ Backend /api/analyze-hunt returns overlays with x_percent and y_percent in valid range (0-100)
✅ All overlay types (stand, corridor, access_route, avoid) have correct structure
✅ Overlay markers visible as colored circles on map
✅ Tapping overlay marker shows detail panel with label, reasoning, confidence
✅ ALL OVERLAYS section lists all overlay items
✅ Edit mode activates with ADD/DELETE toolbar
✅ No regression: all existing backend tests pass (19/21 passed, 2 skipped AI tests)

success_rate.backend: 100% (19/21 tests passed, 2 skipped AI tests due to usage limit)

seed_data_creation: Created test hunt via /api/analyze-hunt with 5 overlays (2 markers + 3 zones). Hunt ID: 2d270170-6ab6-46dc-bf9d-42d3d10891a1. Injected into AsyncStorage for frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for overlay rendering verified successfully. Root cause: CSS percentage strings (left: '50%') don't work reliably in React Native Web's absolute positioning. Fix: converted all overlay positioning to pixel values calculated from MAP_WIDTH and MAP_HEIGHT constants. All overlays now render correctly on the results screen map. Backend returns overlays with x_percent/y_percent coordinates. Frontend converts to pixels: left=(x_percent/100)*MAP_WIDTH-16. Verified with 5 overlays (2 markers + 3 zones) rendering correctly. All interaction features working: tap to show detail panel, ALL OVERLAYS list, MAP/ANALYSIS toggle, edit mode.

bug_fix_verification.bug_description: No overlays are getting put on the map from the LLM AI analyses
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Overlay markers used CSS percentage strings for left positioning (left: '50%') which don't work reliably in React Native Web's absolute positioning
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Converted all overlay positioning to pixel values calculated from MAP_WIDTH and MAP_HEIGHT constants. DraggableMarker: left=(x_percent/100)*MAP_WIDTH-16, top=(y_percent/100)*MAP_HEIGHT-16. Zone overlays: left=((x_percent-width_percent/2)/100)*MAP_WIDTH. Added explicit width to mapContainer, zIndex to markers (10) and zones (5).

backend_returns_overlays.evidence: Backend /api/analyze-hunt returns 5 overlays with x_percent and y_percent coordinates in valid range (0-100). Pytest tests pass.

frontend_renders_overlays.evidence: 5 overlays rendered on map (2 markers + 3 zones). Playwright test confirms overlays visible with pixel positioning: left: 48.44px, top: 194px. Screenshots show colored circles and zones on map.

pixel_positioning.evidence: Marker styles use pixel values (left: 48.44px, top: 194px) instead of percentage strings. Code review confirms calculation: left=(x_percent/100)*MAP_WIDTH-16.

overlay_interaction.evidence: Tapping overlay marker shows detail panel with label, reasoning, confidence. Detail panel closes correctly. ALL OVERLAYS section lists 5 items.

tab_toggle.evidence: MAP/ANALYSIS tab toggle switches views correctly. ANALYSIS tab shows image with overlays (primary view).

edit_mode.evidence: Edit button activates edit mode. ADD/DELETE toolbar appears. Cancel button exits edit mode.
